Our professional tick control services target these dangerous pests where they hide, from residential properties near Emmons Avenue to homes bordering Manhattan Beach Park. With customized treatment plans starting at $125-$325, we help protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses throughout the season.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Sheepshead Bay with eco-friendly tick treatments that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's coastal neighborhoods and provide guaranteed results with flexible scheduling to fit your busy lifestyle.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Sheepshead Bay typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, mild winters can extend tick activity year-round, so property owners near wooded areas or parks should remain vigilant even during cooler months.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Sheepshead Bay?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Sheepshead Bay range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, level of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide ongoing protection throughout tick season for better value and prevention.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We recommend keeping people and pets off treated areas for 2-4 hours after application until surfaces are dry, after which your yard can be enjoyed normally.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Our barrier sprays target ticks at all life stages and create lasting protection for 3-4 weeks. For properties near parks or with heavy vegetation, we recommend monthly treatments during peak season for optimal protection.
